channel.title: What kind of content you would like to hear more about on our newsletters?
channel.description:
Apart from the latest framework updates and new features, do you have any suggestions on what kind of content you would like to read about on our newsletters?
Would you like to see more resources about headless WordPress + React? More tutorials about Frontity? Let me know! Any feedback is welcome!

item.title: What kind of content you would like to hear more about on our newsletters?
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
That sounds great Jesús, many thanks for your suggestion!

Read full topic
item.source: What kind of content you would like to hear more about on our newsletters?

item.title: What kind of content you would like to hear more about on our newsletters?
item.dc:creator: jesus.designer
item.description:
Of course I would like to receive resources about headless WordPress + React, including other topics related to WordPress and JavaScript for example Gutenberg

Read full topic
item.source: What kind of content you would like to hear more about on our newsletters?
